tasks.subject: Task 0: server/achievements.js catalog + pure deriveEarned + unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Server-authoritative achievements catalog (13 data rows) + pure deriveEarned(stats) over the getStats() shape, plus titleLabel(id) and clientCatalog().

**Files:**
- Create: server/achievements.js
- Create: server/achievements.test.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 13 unique-id achievements {id,title,description,statPath,threshold}
- deriveEarned earns AT threshold (not below); never throws on empty/partial/null stats
- titleLabel resolves known ids null otherwise; clientCatalog strips statPath/threshold
- full suite green

**Verify:** npx jest server/achievements.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent

**Steps:** TDD — failing test FIRST (RED), implement pure module (GREEN), full suite, commit. Full code in plan T0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/achievements.js", "server/achievements.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/achievements.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["13 unique-id achievements with {id,title,description,statPath,threshold}", "deriveEarned earns AT threshold not below", "deriveEarned never throws on empty/partial/null stats", "titleLabel resolves known ids and null otherwise", "clientCatalog strips statPath/threshold", "full suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: server/ruleKits.js preset catalog + integrity tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Server-authoritative rule-kit catalog (6 presets) + getKit(id) + listKits() display shape.

**Files:**
- Create: server/ruleKits.js
- Create: server/ruleKits.test.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 6 unique-id kits {id,label,icon,theme,mode,hardcore,tvShows}; every theme valid via themesSystem.isValidTheme; mode in [classic,team,solo,speed]; toggles boolean
- classic_open == all-defaults
- getKit returns kit or null; listKits returns id/label/icon only
- full suite green

**Verify:** npx jest server/ruleKits.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent

**Steps:** TDD — failing catalog-integrity test FIRST (RED), implement pure module (GREEN), full suite, commit. Full code in plan T1. Independent of T0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/ruleKits.js", "server/ruleKits.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/ruleKits.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["6 unique-id kits with valid theme/mode/toggle values", "classic_open is all-defaults", "getKit returns kit or null", "listKits returns id/label/icon only", "full suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: 6b server — titlesSystem sibling-key + equip handler + join attach + myStats enrichment
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Persist equipped title at title:{stableId}; add lobbySystem.setEquippedTitle (re-derive+persist+live re-broadcast); attach titleLabel to player at join; enrich myStats with equippedTitle + achievements:{catalog,earned}.

**Files:**
- Create: server/systems/titlesSystem.js, server/systems/titlesSystem.test.js, server/equipped-title.test.js
- Modify: server/systems/lobbySystem.js (join push ~111-114; new setEquippedTitle + export), server/socketHandlers.js (requestMyStats ~297-303 enrich; new on('setEquippedTitle'))

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- titlesSystem persists at title:{stableId} 90d TTL ONLY when earned; getEquippedTitle null-safe
- lobbySystem.setEquippedTitle refuses unknown/unearned, live-updates seat+broadcasts when in room, persists-without-broadcast otherwise
- joinLobby attaches titleLabel to player object
- myStats enriched with equippedTitle(id|null) + achievements{catalog,earned}; getStats output unchanged
- statsSystem.js byte-identical; full suite green

**Verify:** npx jest server/systems/titlesSystem.test.js server/equipped-title.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent

**Steps:** TDD per plan T2 steps 1-11. Full code in plan T2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/systems/titlesSystem.js", "server/systems/titlesSystem.test.js", "server/equipped-title.test.js", "server/systems/lobbySystem.js", "server/socketHandlers.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/systems/titlesSystem.test.js server/equipped-title.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["titlesSystem persists at title:{stableId} 90d TTL only when earned; getEquippedTitle null-safe", "lobbySystem.setEquippedTitle refuses unknown/unearned, live-updates seat+broadcasts in room, persists-without-broadcast otherwise", "joinLobby attaches titleLabel to player", "myStats enriched with equippedTitle + achievements{catalog,earned}; getStats unchanged", "statsSystem.js byte-identical; full suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: 6b client — Titles wall + equip UI + seat & end-card title render
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Render achievements wall in the existing My Stats modal (earned/locked/equipped + New flag), wire equip, render equipped title on classic lobby seats + local player's end-of-game card.

**Files:**
- Modify: public/js/ui/ui-panels.js (renderMyStats(stats,opts)), public/js/ui/ui-seat.js (gated .seat-title), public/js/ui/ui-render.js (renderLobby seat extra + showGameOverBanner gated title), public/js/socketClient.js (myStats passes onEquip)
- Create: client-tests/achievements-wall.test.js, client-tests/equipped-title-render.test.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- renderMyStats renders 13 rows earned/locked/equipped + equip callback; legacy payload (no achievements) renders no wall
- buildSeatNode renders .seat-title gated on extra.titleLabel
- renderLobby passes titleLabel; showGameOverBanner shows local player's title gated
- existing seat-builder/render-lobby/game-over suites unmodified + green
- full suite green

**Verify:** npx jest client-tests/achievements-wall.test.js client-tests/equipped-title-render.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent

**Steps:** TDD per plan T3 steps 1-10. All new renders GATED on optional fields so sacrosanct client suites stay green. Full code in plan T3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/ui-panels.js", "public/js/ui/ui-seat.js", "public/js/ui/ui-render.js", "public/js/socketClient.js", "client-tests/achievements-wall.test.js", "client-tests/equipped-title-render.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest client-tests/achievements-wall.test.js client-tests/equipped-title-render.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["renderMyStats renders 13 rows earned/locked/equipped + equip callback; legacy payload renders no wall", "buildSeatNode renders .seat-title gated on extra.titleLabel", "renderLobby passes titleLabel; showGameOverBanner shows local player's title gated", "existing seat/lobby/game-over suites unmodified + green", "full suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: 6c — selectRuleKit handler + ruleKitsList emit + chip render
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Apply a kit server-side under one lock (host/waiting, whitelist-validated, one broadcast); emit kit list on connect; render chips client-side + emit selectRuleKit on click.

**Files:**
- Modify: server/systems/lobbySystem.js (selectRuleKit + export), server/socketHandlers.js (ruleKitsList on connect + on('selectRuleKit')), public/js/ui.js (re-export), public/js/socketClient.js (ruleKitsList handler), public/index.html (#rule-kit-chips container ~after #mode-selector)
- Create: public/js/ui/rule-kits.js (renderRuleKitChips), server/rule-kit-select.test.js, client-tests/rule-kit-chips.test.js

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- selectRuleKit sets theme+gameMode+hardcoreMode+allowTvShows host/waiting only, single broadcast, unknown-kit no-op, illegal-field defensive no-op
- ruleKitsList emitted on connect (next to themesList)
- renderRuleKitChips renders one .rule-kit-chip[data-kit-id] per kit; click reports kitId
- socketClient renders chips on ruleKitsList + emits selectRuleKit({lobbyId,kitId})
- index.html has #rule-kit-chips; inline-style suite stays green
- full suite green

**Verify:** npx jest server/rule-kit-select.test.js client-tests/rule-kit-chips.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent

**Steps:** TDD per plan T4 steps 1-12. selectRuleKit reuses lobbyConfig limiter. Full code in plan T4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/systems/lobbySystem.js", "server/socketHandlers.js", "public/js/ui/rule-kits.js", "public/js/ui.js", "public/js/socketClient.js", "public/index.html", "server/rule-kit-select.test.js", "client-tests/rule-kit-chips.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest server/rule-kit-select.test.js client-tests/rule-kit-chips.test.js --verbose && npm test --silent", "acceptanceCriteria": ["selectRuleKit sets 4 fields host/waiting only, single broadcast, unknown-kit no-op", "ruleKitsList emitted on connect", "renderRuleKitChips renders chips + click reports kitId", "socketClient renders chips + emits selectRuleKit", "index.html has #rule-kit-chips; inline-style suite green", "full suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: CSS append — achievements wall + rule-kit chips + title badges (zero deletions)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Style the new DOM additively. Zero deletions, zero edits to existing rules (Phase 4 additive-CSS discipline).

**Files:**
- Modify (append-only): public/css/02-hero-lobby.css (.rule-kit-section, .rule-kit-chips, .rule-kit-chip+children, .seat-title), public/css/04-modals.css (.achievements-wall, .achievements-heading, .achievement-row+modifiers/children, .achievement-equip, .achievement-equipped-badge, .achievement-new, .game-over-title-badge)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- new selectors appended at EOF; no existing rule changed/removed (git diff shows only additions)
- rule-kit chips reuse mode-chip visual language + wrap on mobile
- achievement rows distinguish earned/locked + mark equipped
- full suite green (no new tests)

**Verify:** npm test --silent && git diff --stat origin/main -- public/css/

**Steps:** Append the two CSS blocks (full code in plan T5) at EOF of each file, verify zero deletions via git diff, full suite, commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/css/02-hero-lobby.css", "public/css/04-modals.css"], "verifyCommand": "npm test --silent && git diff --stat origin/main -- public/css/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["new selectors appended at EOF; no existing rule changed/removed", "rule-kit chips reuse mode-chip language + wrap on mobile", "achievement rows distinguish earned/locked + mark equipped", "full suite green"]}
```
